description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a modern, sculpted silhouette and a multi-panel construction. The upper features a blend of pastel tones, including off-white, pale pink, and mint green, with a distinctive abstract pattern on the toe box. The shoe has a thick, segmented sole that appears cushioned and robust, providing both style and support. Laces run through reinforced eyelets up to a padded collar, offering ankle support and a secure fit. Subtle design details, such as embossed lines and a small 'X' motif on the heel, add visual interest. The overall appearance is clean, contemporary, and suitable for urban fashion.
description: A high-top sneaker with pastel color blocking, abstract toe design, and a thick, sculpted sole. Features include laces, padded collar, and subtle embossed details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered panels, thick sole, and pastel color transitions.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the lacing system, padded tongue, and abstract mint green toe pattern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible 'X' motif on the heel and clean panel lines.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded heel, layered construction, and subtle heel detailing.
